title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Incandescent Banking Flame → Secret Creeping Moth
body:
PDR-064 Moment 1 — Coordinator pre-positioning. Information transfer only. Routing authority remains with Incandescent Banking Flame until Secret Creeping Moth broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement.

**Outgoing coordinator**: Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / aa986e
**Incoming coordinator**: Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726
**Owner-directed**: ~13:13Z "Prepare to hand the Directorship to Secret -- there is no rush, use this to improve the handover process, take your time"

**Lineage chain** (this session's role-rotations): Seaworthy → Velvet (~10:48Z) → Seaworthy-acting (~11:30Z) → Seaworthy-official (12:09Z) → Abyssal (12:11Z) → Incandescent (12:52Z) → **Secret (this handoff)**. Sixth Director; fifth role-transition; second window where the handoff was directly tested against PDR-075's substrate-writing discipline (in flight, authored by Twilit Weaving Moon).

**Substrate pointer — comms stream is the canonical record. NO comprehensive handoff-record synthesis follows.** Read the dated comms-event range 12:52Z–present for full Director-window state. Key substrate events (in priority order for incoming-Director bootstrap):

1. **`56b51598`** (broadcast, 13:18Z) — Metacognition reframe: Director is context-allocation + substrate-writing discipline, not authority-with-rules. Tag: behaviour-note. The reframe that has been shaping all my routing decisions; substrate for your own Director discipline.
2. **`02fa64cf`** (broadcast, 13:20Z) — Routing-contradiction worked instance + recursion-of-doctrine fourth instance (Director self-contradicting allocation; verdict-default cure-shape from receiving agent). Tag: failure-mode + behaviour-note.
3. **`8876e6b5`** (broadcast, 12:58Z) — Director tick #1: KEEP Twilit auto-fix verdict + Secret bundle approval + reviewer-dispatch re-route Abyssal→Secret + recursion-of-doctrine triple worked instances (Seaworthy/Secret/Twilit ST). Tag: behaviour-note.

Plus recent (last ~10 min) directed events for live in-flight state: `dc584437` (Twilit WM PDR-075 framing), `705e8415` (Twilit WM allocation), `5857091d` (Twilit ST bundle-marshal stewardship + codex-side adversarial waiver rationale), `5776ee09` (Twilit WM stewardship release), `1c317d09` (Zephyrous ADR-185 v2 GO), `36b1c37d` (Pearly Sonar disposition re-route — likely orphaned, see below).

**Team roster at handoff** (visible in active-claims + most recent team-start/closeout events):

- **Active**: Secret (incoming Director); Twilit Scattering Twilight (resumed; bundle-marshal stewardship); Twilit Weaving Moon (PDR-075 + --tags CLI lanes); Seaworthy (commit marshal, monitors armed across compaction); Clouded (duplication diagnosis — status unknown post-codex-pool closeouts).
- **Closed out this window**: Abyssal (Director window discharged 12:55Z); Pearly (light handoff 13:23Z); Zephyrous (light handoff 13:22Z); Gnarled (light handoff 13:23Z); Torrid (closeout 13:22Z without executing adversarial review).
- **Out earlier**: original Secret window (prior session-close 13:13Z — you re-engaged as incoming Director).

**Single highest-priority action at Moment 2**:

Complete the bundle-cascade marshal cycle. Order: Twilit Scattering Twilight's cure-bundle-v2 marshal-request to Seaworthy → push → then queued Sonar fix bundles (Pearly S7735 — note Pearly closed out, queue intent expired, needs refresh) + Zephyrous S5443 + Seaworthy's own doc edit + Secret consolidation (yours, pre-staged) + ADR-185 v2. Without this landing, the team's work doesn't merge.

**Orphaned items needing your routing**:

- **3 Sonar S6564 ACCEPTED dispositions** (issue keys + rationale in event `36b1c37d` I sent to Pearly at 13:21Z; Pearly closed out before seeing it; Gnarled blocked earlier on MCP gateway). Needs Sonar-MCP-capable session — Clouded if still active, else surface to owner for re-engagement of a Sonar-capable agent.
- **Open Pearly claim `03f5233b`** (commit-workflow.unit.test.ts S7735 fix) — Pearly intentionally retained for the uncommitted one-file fix; Seaworthy refreshes queue intent and commits at tree-green.

**Open owner-decision items** (carried forward from Abyssal handoff, still unresolved):

- §6.15 sha-prefix `.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` adapter — owner-decision pending on write-path (owner-writes / authorise-agent / skip-adapter). Surface to owner in your first tick.
- F-class queue re-position pending F2 owner verdict (handoff §7) — unchanged from Abyssal handoff.

**Cron + monitor state**:

- My cron `130cdcd0` (`*/5 * * * *`, "interrogate each agent" verbatim user prompt + canonical 5-idle-tick exit) continues until your Moment 2. I will CronDelete at Moment 2 per cadence-boundary rule.
- My comms watcher `bwtdmmutb` (all-channels self-excluding aa986e) ends with my session.
- You arm your own coordinator-cadence cron at Moment 2 with your own exit criterion.

**Operating-context reminders** (additions beyond Abyssal handoff §8):

- All quality gates blocking always (owner reminder 12:55Z; reaffirmed in tick #1).
- Idle-detection methodology REFINED again: "no current task AND no trigger firing within ~5 min" (my correction at ~13:01Z after owner flagged "metric not working"; carries forward).
- Substrate-writing discipline (per `56b51598`) is the Director-default behaviour, not a closeout discipline.
- Codex-side adversarial review on Twilit cure-bundle-v2 is WAIVED (see event `5857091d` for rationale); Zephyrous pair-support PASS + Secret claude-side reviewer-dispatch synthesis are the validated review evidence.

**Substrate-writing test confirmation**: per your 13:21:48Z directed event, you bootstrapped from substrate event `56b51598` alone with no handoff-record-synthesis dependency. PDR-075 has its ratification evidence from this session. Cite explicitly in Twilit Weaving Moon's PDR-075 draft when they surface it for your verdict (or mine, if Moment 2 hasn't fired by then).

**Cadence-boundary discharge protocol per PDR-064**: my cron `130cdcd0` runs through Moment 1 (this broadcast); ends at Moment 2 (your active-acknowledgement broadcast). Within the same role-authority window the cadence never goes dark.

Standing by for your Moment 2 active-acknowledgement (conventional title *"Coordinator role acknowledgement: Secret Creeping Moth from Incandescent Banking Flame"*, referencing this event via `in_response_to`).

— Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / aa986e (outgoing Director, Moment 1)
